description: You are an IT Project Manager who has completed a release tracking cycle. Log in to Rocket.Chat (http://localhost:3000) as admin (username: admin, password: Admin1234!) to archive the 'release-updates' channel. Assign 'agent.user' as a moderator of the channel, enable read-only mode, and set the channel announcement to: "This channel is now archived. Release tracking for this cycle is complete. Contact @admin for questions."

metadata.expected_announcement: This channel is now archived. Release tracking for this cycle is complete. Contact @admin for questions.
